data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of pausing without losing a slot.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Pause without losing slot', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. While the linked use case mentions the ability to pause for a vacation month without losing the preferred time permanently, there is no direct evidence or API reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the pause functionality without losing the slot.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for pause functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that customers can pause their reservations without losing their slots.
